summary: Iteration-8 frontend-only retest of the 3 critical regressions reported in iteration_7.json. All 3 fixes VERIFIED PASSING. Smoke regression of previously-passing iter-7 testids also all PASS. No new regressions. Backend pytest skipped per main-agent instruction (97/97 already green).

dashboard_/school/<sid>/.verdict: PASS - SchoolLayout sidebar fully renders at the index route. Previous iter-7 navigation was incorrectly using /school/<sid>/dashboard which has no Route and is caught by the * catch-all and redirected to /.

timetable_/school/<sid>/timetable.verdict: PASS - openActivityScheduler / onActivityPick / scheduleActivity handlers now defined; load() also fetches /activities and calls setActivities. No ReferenceError, full dialog renders with all 3 expected testids.

classes_/school/<sid>/classes.click_behaviour: POST /classes/auto-match-facilities preview returned 0 matches for seeded data and sonner toast 'No room_no -> facility matches found' rendered. This is the expected happy-path success for default seed.
classes_/school/<sid>/classes.verdict: PASS - autoMatchFacilities handler defined and end-to-end network call works.

critical_code_review_comments: Carry-over (not retested in iter-8 since not requested): perms.py email-fallback should normalize to lowercase; members.py POST upsert return should call serialize_doc; ai.py auto-from-attendance dead `and False` expression at line ~140. These were noted in iteration_7 and remain valid suggestions.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (3/3 critical regressions fixed + 7/7 regression smoke testids present)

test_credentials: Mongo-injected Super Admin session (datetime expires_at, user_id field) -- ephemeral session_token=pw_test_i8_1779202352215, cleaned up after the run via direct pymongo delete.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed created. Auto-match-facilities preview ran against existing seeded classes and naturally returned zero matches; nothing applied.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter-7 frontend regressions are fixed. Future agents must use /school/<sid>/ (trailing slash, no 'dashboard' segment) when verifying SchoolLayout sidebar. The protected-route Auth fallback is /login, and the catch-all <Route path='*'> redirects to /. When injecting a Super Admin session: db.users requires user_id (string) and db.user_sessions requires expires_at as a real datetime, not a string (auth.py compares against datetime.now(timezone.utc)).
rca of the issue: Iter-7 reported 3 regressions; all three are now resolved. (1) Timetable openActivityScheduler/onActivityPick/scheduleActivity are implemented at Timetable.jsx lines 52-87 and load() at lines 32-50 also fetches /activities. (2) Classes autoMatchFacilities is implemented at Classes.jsx lines 68-78 doing preview -> window.confirm -> apply round-trip. (3) The earlier dashboard 'sidebar missing' was a test-side mistake: /school/<sid>/dashboard is not a defined Route and is caught by `<Route path='*' element={<Navigate to="/" replace />}/>` so the test landed on the Schools listing instead of inside SchoolLayout. The correct path is /school/<sid>/ which uses `<Route index element={<SchoolDashboard/>}/>` and renders the sidebar.
